title: Incorrect result for COUNT(), UTF16be encoding and SUBSTR
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(c0 COLLATE BINARY);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t0 WHERE SUBSTR(t0.c0, ',');
key_bug_features: COUNT() with SUBSTR on UTF16be encoded data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value BLOB);
INSERT INTO t1(name, value) VALUES ('test1', x'00FF');
INSERT INTO t1(name, value) VALUES ('test2', x'0000');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE SUBSTR(value, 1, 1) = x'00';
